text:
Created attachment 163489
Screenshot of Safari 9 showing the SVG version of streambag.se

This bug is still present in browsers such as Safari 9 and Chromium 46. The attached screenshots shows how it looks in Safari (it looks the same in Chromium). The "fixed" version of streambag.se looks different, but is still far from correct.
